message.content: This section provides a ranked list of the top 16 highest-grossing new overseas mobile games for the full year of 2025. It contains quantitative metrics (annual revenue in billion RMB) paired with game titles and their respective publishers/developers. The data is structured as a descending revenue ranking, enabling direct retrieval for questions regarding: (1) the 2025 full-year revenue and market rank of specific new mobile games, (2) publisher/developer attribution for top-performing overseas titles, and (3) comparative revenue performance across the listed games. Key entities include game titles (e.g., 奔奔王国, SD钢弹G世代永恒, 弓箭传说2, 七骑士 Re:BIRTH, 枫之谷：放置冒险记) and publishers (e.g., 点点互动, 万代南梦宫, 海彼游戏, 网石游戏, NEXON, CyGames, FunPlus). The evidence type is a structured quantitative ranking list with a defined temporal scope (2025). No definitions, procedures, or qualitative claims are included.
